name: okaneland-mcp
description: Verified AI-tool prices and AI product margin math for agents.
long_description: Two tools for building and pricing AI products. get_ai_tool_prices returns live, human-verified pricing for 100+ AI tools (what is free, the real monthly cost, the gotcha, the last-verified date) from okaneland.com. calculate_ai_margin turns an AI product's MRR into what you keep after the token bill, card fees, failed payments, refunds and tax, plus the break-even price and usage cap. Runs locally over stdio; nothing to host.
_note_inputSchema: MCPB's schema forbids per-tool inputSchema, but Smithery's release API requires it. The bundle is built with a plain zip (scripts/pack.sh), not `mcpb pack`, so these schemas survive. `mcpb validate` will flag them; that is expected. See PUBLISHING.md.

tools.name: get_ai_tool_prices
tools.description: Current, human-verified pricing for 100+ AI tools, fetched live from the maintained index at okaneland.com.

category.description: Exact category name to filter by.

query.description: Free-text match against a tool's name, description, id, or category.

limit.description: Maximum number of tools to return.

tools.name: calculate_ai_margin
tools.description: Turns an AI product's MRR into what you keep after the token bill, fees, churn and tax, plus break-even price and usage cap.

pricePerMonth.description: What one customer pays per month, in USD.

payingCustomers.description: Number of paying customers right now.

blendedTokenPricePerM.description: Blended model token price in USD per million tokens.

tokensPerUserM.description: Millions of tokens an average user burns per month.

intlCardPct.description: Percent of sales on international cards (default 40).

vatPct.description: Sales tax / VAT percent you remit (default 0).

failedPaymentsPct.description: Percent of gross lost to failed and declined cards (default 9).

refundsPct.description: Percent of gross lost to refunds and disputes (default 3).
